data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement that a booking should be blocked if the intake form is incomplete. However, the evidence provided does not confirm that the system enforces this requirement, as it only describes the functionality of the intake form without demonstrating that incomplete forms lead to booking restrictions. Specifically, the linked use case mentions the need for required fields to be complete before an appointment, but there is no evidence showing that bookings are actively blocked when forms are incomplete.
gaps: No evidence confirming that bookings are blocked when the intake form is incomplete.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
